Use e-mail to get in touch. E-mail addresses change annually.

To report a bug use: 

  bug{{CURRENTYEAR}} AT supermemo DOT org

To ask for technical help use:

  help{{CURRENTYEAR}} AT supermemo DOT org

To ask questions about your order use:

  shop{{CURRENTYEAR}} AT supermemo DOT org (or use this contact form: https://supermemo.store/pages/contact)

To have your instructions or unlock password resent use:

  moni{{CURRENTYEAR}} AT supermemo DOT org (or use this contact form: https://supermemo.store/pages/contact)

To send your registration file (register.txt):

  register{{CURRENTYEAR}} AT supermemo DOT org (or use this contact form: https://supermemo.store/pages/contact)

If your experience mail delivery problems, you can try to use the contact form (use it as a last resort due to the mix-up of a variety of messages received):

  '''[https://supermemo.store/pages/contact Contact Form]'''

To ask questions about [https://supermemo.com supermemo.com] use:

  support AT supermemo DOT com

If you need to mail your collection, see [https://supermemopedia.com/wiki/How_can_I_send_a_collection_via_e-mail%3F How can I send a collection via e-mail?]

For more see: 
* [[Technical support]]
* [https://supermemopedia.com/wiki/Can_you_tutor_me%3F Online tutoring]
